purpose: Durable P15 aiflow queue for post-P14 evidence attachment, keeping P14 completion evidence machine-checkable while opening the next focused governance batch.

aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/current.txt, bench/regression-report.json, bench/summary.md, bin/gofly, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.
aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P15 tasks are submitted to ignored local aiflow runtime state and mirrored here as durable docs/reference evidence; each task must be completed in order and committed by the current agent or human only after its gate passes or an environment-limited downgrade is documented.

previousBatchHandoff.completionPolicy: P14 is treated as completed only when all three task rows in docs/reference/governance-p14-roadmap.json carry completion status, verification commands, and pending-current-commit placeholders owned by their per-task commits.
previousBatchHandoff.runtimeStatePolicy: Local .aiflow queue data is runtime evidence only; durable completion evidence belongs in docs/reference/governance-p14-roadmap.json and docs/reference/governance-boundary-inventory.json.

tasks.title: P14 completion handoff
tasks.objective: Convert P14 from active completed roadmap evidence into the latest completed governance batch and open P15 as the next active aiflow batch.
tasks.deliverable: P14 completed task evidence, P15 active roadmap, boundary inventory transition, dashboard convergence fields, and aiflow runtime-state exclusion proof.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after the P14 completion handoff and P15 active-batch evidence pass boundary inventory and governance report gates without staging ignored runtime state

tasks.title: RPC release-train attachment
tasks.objective: Attach the first concrete RPC release-train evidence bundle or keep promotion held with a narrower blocker inventory across unary, stream, resolver, balancer, rollback, and budget rows.
tasks.deliverable: RPC release-train attachment policy, promoted or held surface inventory, blocker diff from P14, Kitex rollback evidence, and benchmark budget decision.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC release-train attachment evidence and benchmark gates pass; keep latency report-only unless release-train data is durable

tasks.title: Gateway cache budget attachment
tasks.objective: Promote gateway proxy and cache hot path benchmark evidence from candidate report-only toward allocation budget attachment only when baseline samples, current trend samples, and rollback notes are present.
tasks.deliverable: Gateway/cache benchmark budget attachment decision, baseline and current trend evidence policy, allocation mode, latency report-only boundary, and rollback note.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after gateway/cache budget attachment evidence passes bench-regression-check without overstating unsupported or weak latency rows
